name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Voters would show up if Trump is on 2016 ballot
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zkkuhjl-drdiuiutjh-r/)
---

| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zkkuhjl-drdiuiutjh-y/)
| |
---
\- November 24 2015 -
Voters would show up if Trump is on 2016 ballot

| Dear Peter Willis, If Donald Trump were the GOP nominee, he would cause the highest voter turnout, relative to any other Republican hopeful.John Kasich, on the other hand, would keep people at home. No matter what party affiliation you consider, Trump brings them out. Republicans, Democrats and independents are all most likely to show up if Trump is on the ballot. (In our analysis, we assumed a constant variable: the Democrats nominating Hillary Clinton.)Not only do they show up to vote, but they vote for Trump. He's got the highest percentage of voters -- across both parties and independents.The other candidates cause more of a snooze response from the public. Among the Republicans surveyed, Kasich caused the lowest voter turnout. But Ben Carson, Jeb Bush, Marco Rubio, and Carly Fiorina all saw lower voter turnouts compared with Trump.To read more visit [CNBC website here](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zkkuhjl-drdiuiutjh-j/).
---

| Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
[info@donaldtrump.com](mailto:info@donaldtrump.com)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: please open this email, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45066910:JIGIhfLNj:m:1:1349778030:EAA80BC7DA327D3790FBF48681075C37:r)
---
| | | |
Peter,

**[I need your immediate support and help to fight back.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45066911:JIGIhfLNj:m:1:1349778030:EAA80BC7DA327D3790FBF48681075C37:r)**

According to an article in the LA Times, the Democrats are afraid of my campaign so they are hoping Republicans will do their dirty work for them.

Peter, the Democrats are scared because they're watching my polling numbers and seeing the impact our campaign is having across the country. They know my campaign's message and ideas for our nation are resonating with millions of Americans. **They know I will be the candidate who defeats Hillary Clinton next November. **

But Peter, in order to run a winning campaign and go up against the huge war chests of my opponents on both sides, we need to close out this November with strong numbers.

**We've set a goal of raising $150,000 by midnight on Monday, November 30th. Will you help us reach that right now?**
---
| | [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**Emergency November DONATION**
**Donation: Pending** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45066911:JIGIhfLNj:m:1:1349778030:EAA80BC7DA327D3790FBF48681075C37:r)
---
| Peter, I'm being attacked by both sides. Right now the Establishment Republicans are attacking me in the media for being "too conservative." And the Democrats are gleefully watching this and hoping that my OWN party does their work for them.

When I announced my campaign for president, I knew it would come with slander and attacks. But it has been quite unfortunate that some of those attacks have come from within our own party.

**I am the only candidate who will defeat Hillary Clinton next November, but I cannot do so unless I have your support today. **

**[Would you please consider chipping in $5, $10, $15 or more right now to ensure we meet our November goal?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45066911:JIGIhfLNj:m:1:1349778030:EAA80BC7DA327D3790FBF48681075C37:r)**
---
| | [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**Emergency November DONATION**
**Donation: Pending** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45066911:JIGIhfLNj:m:1:1349778030:EAA80BC7DA327D3790FBF48681075C37:r)
---
| **The time has come for our generation to lead the way toward a New American Century.** **[Your donation today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45066911:JIGIhfLNj:m:1:1349778030:EAA80BC7DA327D3790FBF48681075C37:r)** will send a strong message to the leftist mainstream media that our campaign has the fortitude of thousands in every state and every corner of the United States; and together we are going **_to take our country back._ **

In order to fight back, and ensure victory next fall I need [**your support.
Peter, will you strengthen my campaign by making a much needed donation today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45066911:JIGIhfLNj:m:1:1349778030:EAA80BC7DA327D3790FBF48681075C37:r)

Sincerely,
---
| |
---
| Marco Rubio
Republican Candidate for President P.S. Your support today will go a long way for our campaign. Our campaign's Month-End deadline is quickly approaching and I need your help to ensure we finish the month with the strongest numbers possible. **[Please follow this link to make a donation right now to guarantee your name is there!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45066911:JIGIhfLNj:m:1:1349778030:EAA80BC7DA327D3790FBF48681075C37:r)**
---
| | [**Donate Today** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45066911:JIGIhfLNj:m:1:1349778030:EAA80BC7DA327D3790FBF48681075C37:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

name: Chris Christie
subject: Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
In politics, "new" can be exciting. It can be attractive.
But "new" is untested.

This President was "new" in 2008 - boy was he ever. Look at what that legacy of newness and inexperience has brought us.

We can't afford to have another person behind the desk in the Oval Office who sees America as Barack Obama sees it. And we can't afford to have another inexperienced candidate to run the country as Barack Obama has over the past 6 years.

**[Donate $5, $10 or even $50 today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45079380:6DflnfLhN:m:1:1516426255:A2566D7C3C5209D55EA1C1CFD13DAEDC:r)** to make sure we have a strong, experienced leader in the White House who understands the world as it really is.

I am tested and ready to stand up for this country and put Americans first. Thank you for your support!

\-- Chris
****

****
****
****

---
| |
---|---|---
| | Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc.
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: CNN reporter conspires with Hillary to smear me!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative,
"EMAILS: CNN REPORTER COORDINATED WITH
HILLARY AIDE TO SMEAR RAND PAUL . . ."

That was the headline that broke right before
Thanksgiving following the U.S. State Department's release of a
trove of emails.

These emails show a CNN reporter coordinated
with Clinton staffer to launch social media attacks against me
for daring to ask Secretary Clinton tough questions during the
2013 Benghazi hearing!

Shortly after that hearing, emails show she
even congratulated the Clinton team stating, "[Hillary] was
great. well done. I hope you're going to have a big drink
tonight."

With the December 15 Republican Debate in Las
Vegas rapidly approaching, I have to ask...

Is this a reporter concerned with uncovering
critical news to bring to the American people? Or is this a
partisan who's already in the tank for her Democrat candidate of
choice?

Fellow Conservative, we can't allow the media's
shenanigans to silence us. We have to break through and take our
message of liberty straight to the American people.

If you agree, will you please make your most
generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 to my campaign's
Money Bomb at once?

The truth is, I'm fed up with stories like
this.

First, it was news that former Clintonista
George Stephanopoulos tried to hide fat contributions to the
Clinton Foundation while masquerading as an objective news
anchor.

Then the American people witnessed the utter
embarrassment of CNBC debate.

And now this?

Is it any wonder why recent polls show 60% of
Americans don't trust the news media?

After winning the night with my strong
performance during the last Republican debate, my campaign has
seen a massive increase in momentum, fundraising and
on-the-ground grassroots support.

We've posted growing poll numbers both
nationally and in key early states like Iowa.

And thanks to your support, we reached
$500,000 in our last money bomb!

Fellow Conservative, my campaign's growth over the past
few weeks is the biggest story our national media just won't
touch . . .

That's why I'm counting on you to help me
break through.

A big money bomb for my campaign during this
most critical time will FORCE their hands and give me a big boost
of momentum heading into the next Republican Debate.

It will help silence those in the media who
are using their platform to smear me.

And it will help pave the road to the victory
you and I are fighting so hard for.

So please agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 at once!

Thank you for your support.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Maria Comella
subject: Here's the video
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|
---
| |
---|---
|
| | | If you have ever been to one of Governor Christie's town halls you know you can experience a range of emotions - you laugh, you cry, you laugh again. One of the most poignant and personal stories he has shared with people over time is about his mother and the lasting impact she has had on him as a father and a leader. [_The New York Times_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45089061:6Sj45fLNY:m:1:1516426255:14A7A37AF7D7B695B133738DCFF7AB42:r) wrote about this moving story as Governor Christie shared it this past Saturday in a town hall in Stratham, New Hampshire. Here is the video of the actual story from that day. Take a look. It might just give you a little insight in to why he is the way he is. [WATCH - Christie: Nothing Left Unsaid](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45089062:6Sj45fLNY:m:1:1516426255:14A7A37AF7D7B695B133738DCFF7AB42:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45089062:6Sj45fLNY:m:1:1516426255:14A7A37AF7D7B695B133738DCFF7AB42:r) Help to share this video by clicking **[here for Facebook](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45089063:6Sj45fLNY:m:1:1516426255:14A7A37AF7D7B695B133738DCFF7AB42:r)** and **[here for Twitter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45089064:6Sj45fLNY:m:1:1516426255:14A7A37AF7D7B695B133738DCFF7AB42:r) **** ** Maria

name: Mandi Karp
subject: no-politics-on-Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Here's my promise to you, friend. Thursday is off-limits.

When you're watching the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade, or enjoying turkey at the dinner table, or relaxing in the evening -- you won't be receiving any emails from Team Murphy.

We have a strict no-politics-on-Thanksgiving policy (although we can't control your relatives), so I'm going to say what I have to say right now. **Patrick is our best chance to win Florida 's Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats.**

As Patrick's finance director, I'm constantly looking at our numbers and figuring out what we need to keep our momentum up. **And we NEED to hit our fundraising goal this November.**

[**Give $3 or more and head into the holidays knowing we 're that much closer to turning the Senate blue. We're still $15,125 away from our goal.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21d1/738133e4/3a2e496a/7f8344e4/2273758221/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151125?refcode=pme151125_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Despite what the Koch Brothers believe, the foundation for successful campaigns is built on the small contributions of many. If anyone appreciates this, it's Patrick. One of his first jobs as a teenager was pouring concrete on construction sites. He knows the importance of a strong foundation.

We've made progress on building a good foundation so far, but recent polls have Patrick neck-and-neck with Republican candidates and barely polling stronger than his primary opponent Alan Grayson.

This race is still much too close to get comfortable. _Bloomberg Business_ said the "War for the Senate will be decided in Florida," and the Kochs and their ultra-wealthy conservative friends won't be giving up without an expensive fight.

[**Help us strengthen our foundation for victory by making a contribution right now. We have 5 more days to reach $50,000.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21d1/738133e4/3a2e496a/7f8344e4/2273758221/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151125?refcode=pme151125_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thanks and have a happy Thanksgiving,

Mandi | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21d1/738133e4/3a2e496a/7f8344e5/2273758221/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21d1/738133e4/3a2e496a/7f8344e6/2273758221/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21d1/738133e4/3a2e496a/7f8344e7/2273758221/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Wanted to reach out one last time
body:
Friend -- Sorry to reach out the day before Thanksgiving, but I need your help one more time before we take a short respite from the campaign trail to spend time with our families.

**We 're only 5 days away from our November fundraising deadline, and the last thing I want to do is reach back out when we're all enjoying that quality time. That's why we need to raise $15,000 by midnight tonight.**

[**Can you chip in $50, $25, or even just $1 so we can reach this goal in 8 hours?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/vkrbdkyzmghnrcrfnktbmnqcyynqzcdzbkjkhzcprfmy_vgjhhmyr.html)

I wish this deadline didn't fall so close to Thanksgiving, but we have no choice -- we still have a critical fundraising goal to meet and only 5 days to do it.

**I can 't do it without you, Friend. Please chip in $50, $25, or even just $1 before midnight, I would really appreciate your support: [Jeb2016.com/Donate](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/jbfhctnkfmvwspsbwtdhfwzpnnwzkpckhtqtvkpjsbns_vgjhhmyr.html)**

I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving with your family, and I'm grateful to have you on our team.

Happy Thanksgiving,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/erzljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcydrqr_vgjhhmyr.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.

clean_body: Friend -- Sorry to reach out the day before Thanksgiving, but I need your help one more time before we take a short respite from the campaign trail to spend time with our families. We 're only 5 days away from our November fundraising deadline, and the last thing I want to do is reach back out when we're all enjoying that quality time. That's why we need to raise $15,000 by midnight tonight. I wish this deadline didn't fall so close to Thanksgiving, but we have no choice -- we still have a critical fundraising goal to meet and only 5 days to do it. I can 't do it without you, Friend. Please chip in $50, $25, or even just $1 before midnight, I would really appreciate your support: I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving with your family, and I'm grateful to have you on our team. Happy Thanksgiving, Jeb Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc. Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144

name: Doug Stafford
subject: ICYMI: CNN Conspires Against Rand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
In case you missed it: A newly revealed State Department email
shows that CNN correspondent Elise Labott coordinated with
Hillary Clinton's aids to discredit Rand during the 2013 Benghazi
hearings.
Even I didn't think CNN would actually go
this far.
The liberal media has taken their Clinton
sycophancy to a new low. CNN needs to address this bias and lack
of journalistic integrity. This email revelation should give
Republicans pause as to their coverage and possibility of fair
treatment towards Sen. Paul during the next debate. All eyes will
be on CNN's response to their employee colluding with Hillary
Clinton in order to attack a prominent U.S. senator on their
dime.
Will you #StandWithRand against this
ridiculous media bias today?
In Liberty,
Doug Stafford

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Rand Paul <info@randpaul2016.com>
Date: Wed, Nov 25, 2015 at 1:40 PM
Subject: Preview - CNN reporter conspires
with Hillary to smear me!
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Dear Fellow Conservative,
"EMAILS: CNN REPORTER COORDINATED WITH
HILLARY AIDE TO SMEAR RAND PAUL . . ."

That was the headline that broke right before
Thanksgiving following the U.S. State Department's release of a
trove of emails.

These emails show a CNN reporter coordinated
with Clinton staffer to launch social media attacks against me
for daring to ask Secretary Clinton tough questions during the
2013 Benghazi hearing!

Shortly after that hearing, emails show she
even congratulated the Clinton team stating, "[Hillary] was
great. well done. I hope you're going to have a big drink
tonight."

With the December 15 Republican Debate in Las
Vegas rapidly approaching, I have to ask...

Is this a reporter concerned with uncovering
critical news to bring to the American people? Or is this a
partisan who's already in the tank for her Democrat candidate of
choice?

Fellow Conservative, we can't allow the media's
shenanigans to silence us. We have to break through and take our
message of liberty straight to the American people.

If you agree, will you please make your most
generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 to my campaign's
Money Bomb at once?

The truth is, I'm fed up with stories like
this.

First, it was news that former Clintonista
George Stephanopoulos tried to hide fat contributions to the
Clinton Foundation while masquerading as an objective news
anchor.

Then the American people witnessed the utter
embarrassment of the CNBC debate.

And now this?

Is it any wonder why recent polls show 60% of
Americans don't trust the news media?

After winning the night with my strong
performance during the last Republican debate, my campaign has
seen a massive increase in momentum, fundraising and
on-the-ground grassroots support.

We've posted growing poll numbers both
nationally and in key early states like Iowa.

And thanks to your support, we reached
$500,000 in our last money bomb!

Fellow Conservative, my campaign's growth over the past
few weeks is the biggest story our national media just won't
touch . . .

That's why I'm counting on you to help me
break through.

A big money bomb for my campaign during this
most critical time will FORCE their hands and give me a big boost
of momentum heading into the next Republican Debate.

It will help silence those in the media who
are using their platform to smear me.

And it will help pave the road to the victory
you and I are fighting so hard for.

So please agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 at once!

Thank you for your support.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Katie McGinty
subject: End the violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---

Friend --

Global violence against women is an epidemic, harming and killing millions of women worldwide every year.

It needs to end, and it needs to end now. Today is International Day to End Violence Against Women, and the start of the 16 Days Campaign to tackle global gender-based violence.

[**Today, I 'm joining people across the world to call for an end to this violence. Will you join me? Add your name here to stand up for women and girls.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3057596804389404672/-5213740102890553344?ms=20151125&refcode=e20151125&amount=15)

Every 28 minutes, somewhere in the world a child is getting married. More than 15 million girls have been cut. 30% of women and girls are sexually assaulted or raped. In too many countries, domestic violence is the number one threat to a woman's health, safety, and well being.

These aren't just statistics or numbers. They're real people whose lives are destroyed or ended by the countless acts of violence committed against them. Violence against women is destructive and pervasive, and it's past time that as a global community, we stood together to call for an end to it.

[**Add your name here to join me in taking a stand to end the violence.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3057596804389404672/-5213740102890553344?ms=20151125&refcode=e20151125&amount=15)

I want my three daughters to grow up in a world that values them -- a world that respects them and grants them the same rights and freedoms and privileges that any man has. Above all, I want them to grow up in a world that is safe for them. Without safety, not one of our girls can fulfill her potential.

Thank you for standing with me. Today and every day, we can make a difference by standing up for what's right and doing everything we can to end the global epidemic of violence against women.

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3057596804389404672/-5141682508852625408?refcode=e20151125&amount=15)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/3057596804389404672/-5285797696928481280).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

In too many countries, domestic violence is the number one threat to a woman's health, safety, and well being. These aren't just statistics or numbers. name: Robby Mook, HillaryClinton.com
subject: I appreciate you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Because you're great. | Friend --

I know, it’s a little cheesy to tell you that I’m thankful for you. But it’s true. We're going to do some incredible things together.

When you became a member of Team Hillary, you weren't just helping build this campaign. You also said that you were standing with Hillary in this fight, and that's amazing.

We're going to make history -- thanks for being a part of it.

Happy Thanksgiving,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

\----
This campaign is funded by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors -- **chip in $1 to stand with Hillary right now:** | | [**Donate**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQwODcwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyNTI4OTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=MjQwODcwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyNTI4OTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQwODcwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyNTI4OTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQwODcwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyNTI4OTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQwODcwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyNTI4OTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQwODcwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyNTI4OTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQwODcwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyNTI4OTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjQwODcwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyNTI4OTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=MjQwODcwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyNTI4OTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQwODcwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyNTI4OTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjQwODcwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyNTI4OTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
